name: Agent 365 Channel
description: Microsoft 365 Agents SDK channel adapter - bridges the Activity protocol to the BotNexus routing pipeline (Register tier)

configSchema.description: Entra application (client) ID of the registered Agent 365 app.
Entra application client secret used to authenticate outbound Activity replies via the Agents SDK connector.
Entra tenant ID for the app registration. Optional for multi-tenant apps.
Base URL of the channel service the connector sends outbound activities to. Defaults to the serviceUrl carried on the inbound Activity when absent.
BotNexus agent ID this channel routes inbound messages to.
HTTP route the Agents SDK message endpoint is hosted on for inbound Activity delivery.
